task_context.actionable_question: Which students are dangerously disengaged and need outreach?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Define 'low engagement' threshold. List students below it. Recommend admin action (email/contact).

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: The analysis identifies a significant group of students exhibiting dangerously low engagement levels, characterized by minimal platform activity and engagement scores. This consistent pattern of low clicks and active days suggests a critical need for outreach to re-engage these students.

Insights: Consistent Low Engagement: A total of 1544 students have been identified with an engagement score below 0.002, indicating a severe lack of interaction with course materials. Most students in this group have only one active day and a maximum of two clicks, reflecting a concerning trend of disengagement.

Educational implications: Students with low engagement may struggle academically and require immediate support to improve their learning outcomes.

Recommendations: high - Initiate outreach to all students with an engagement score below 0.002. - Direct communication can help identify barriers to engagement and provide necessary support to re-engage these students.

insights.title: Consistent Low Engagement
insights.description: A total of 1544 students have been identified with an engagement score below 0.002, indicating a severe lack of interaction with course materials. Most students in this group have only one active day and a maximum of two clicks, reflecting a concerning trend of disengagement.

evidence.context: Majority of students have only one click.
Students are only active for one day.

educational_implications: Students with low engagement may struggle academically and require immediate support to improve their learning outcomes.

recommendations.action: Initiate outreach to all students with an engagement score below 0.002.
recommendations.rationale: Direct communication can help identify barriers to engagement and provide necessary support to re-engage these students.

confidence.reason: The dataset is comprehensive and clearly indicates a pattern of low engagement across a significant number of students.

evaluation_constraints.description: Do not name individual students beyond identifiers already present in returned data.
Treat the output as internal admin use when individual identifiers are listed.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
